title: IELTS Listening: Lecture on Sustainable Architecture
transcript: Welcome to today lecture on urban planning. We analyse how modern architects integrate sustainable energy resources into residential high-rises. Our focus is on reducing energy consumption and creating eco-friendly infrastructure.
translation: Arsitektur berkelanjutan mengintegrasikan sumber energi terbarukan ke dalam gedung bertingkat tinggi.

questions.question: What is the main focus of the lecture on sustainable architecture?
options: Integrating energy resources and eco-friendly infrastructure

questions.question: What type of buildings are specifically mentioned?
What is one goal of sustainable architecture according to the lecture?

title: IELTS Listening: Student Registration Conversation
transcript: Staff: Good morning, how can I help you? Student: Hi, I am here to complete my registration for the advanced IELTS preparation course. Staff: I need to verify your student identification card and your language proficiency score certificate. Student: Here they are. Staff: Thank you. Your registration is now complete. The course begins on Monday.
translation: Percakapan registrasi kursus persiapan IELTS di kantor administrasi.

questions.question: What is the student registering for?
What documents does the staff need to verify?
options: Student ID and language proficiency certificate

questions.question: When does the course begin?

title: IELTS Listening: Radio Program on Climate Change
transcript: Today we discuss the latest IPCC report findings. Scientists confirm that global temperatures have risen 1.2 degrees Celsius above pre-industrial levels. Experts warn that without immediate action to cut carbon emissions by 45% before 2030, catastrophic weather events will become more frequent. Renewable energy adoption must accelerate significantly.
translation: Laporan IPCC mengkonfirmasi kenaikan suhu 1,2 derajat Celsius. Emisi karbon harus dipotong 45% sebelum 2030.

questions.question: By how much have global temperatures risen above pre-industrial levels?
By what percentage must carbon emissions be cut before 2030?
What must accelerate significantly according to experts?

title: IELTS Listening: Museum Audio Guide
transcript: Welcome to the Natural History Museum. You are now entering the Jurassic Hall, which houses over 200 dinosaur fossils. The centerpiece is a Tyrannosaurus Rex skeleton, discovered in Montana in 1988 and measuring 12 meters in length. Photography is permitted but please refrain from using flash as it may damage sensitive exhibits.
translation: Panduan audio museum sejarah alam tentang Aula Jurassic yang menampilkan lebih dari 200 fosil dinosaurus.

questions.question: How many dinosaur fossils are housed in the Jurassic Hall?
Where was the T-Rex skeleton discovered?
What photography rule applies in the museum?

title: IELTS Listening: University Lecture on Economics
transcript: In today lecture, we examine Keynesian economic theory, which advocates for government spending during economic downturns to stimulate demand. John Maynard Keynes published his General Theory of Employment in 1936, fundamentally challenging classical economic assumptions. Modern economists debate whether fiscal multipliers justify deficit spending during recessions.
translation: Teori ekonomi Keynesian mengadvokasi pengeluaran pemerintah saat kemerosotan ekonomi untuk merangsang permintaan.

questions.question: What does Keynesian economic theory advocate?
When did Keynes publish his General Theory?
What do modern economists debate?
options: Whether fiscal multipliers justify deficit spending
Whether to return to gold standard

title: IELTS Listening: Health Podcast on Sleep Science
transcript: Research from the National Sleep Foundation shows adults need between seven and nine hours of sleep per night for optimal cognitive function. Chronic sleep deprivation is linked to increased risk of cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and mental health disorders. Blue light from electronic devices suppresses melatonin production, disrupting circadian rhythms. Experts recommend avoiding screens one hour before bedtime.
translation: Orang dewasa membutuhkan 7-9 jam tidur per malam. Kekurangan tidur kronis terkait penyakit jantung dan diabetes. Cahaya biru dari perangkat elektronik mengganggu ritme sirkadian.

questions.question: How many hours of sleep do adults need per night?
What does blue light from screens suppress?
What do experts recommend before bedtime?
options: Avoiding screens one hour before bed

title: IELTS Listening: Travel Agency Booking Conversation
transcript: Agent: How can I assist you today? Customer: I want to book a package tour to Japan for two people in October. Agent: Excellent choice. Our Japan autumn tour includes flights from Jakarta, 10 nights hotel accommodation in Tokyo and Kyoto, and guided temple tours. The price is 25 million Rupiah per person. Customer: Does that include meals? Agent: Breakfast and dinner are included.
translation: Percakapan pemesanan paket wisata ke Jepang untuk dua orang pada bulan Oktober. Harga 25 juta per orang termasuk sarapan dan makan malam.

questions.question: Where does the customer want to travel?
How many nights accommodation does the package include?
What meals are included in the package?

title: IELTS Listening: Science Documentary on Ocean Plastics
transcript: An estimated eight million metric tons of plastic enter the world oceans annually. Microplastics, particles smaller than five millimeters, have been detected in marine organisms from zooplankton to blue whales. Scientists at the Ocean Conservancy warn that at current trajectories, there will be more plastic than fish in the ocean by 2050. Biodegradable alternatives and extended producer responsibility laws are being implemented globally.
translation: Sekitar 8 juta ton plastik masuk ke laut setiap tahun. Microplastik terdeteksi dalam organisme laut. Pada 2050 bisa ada lebih banyak plastik daripada ikan di lautan.

questions.question: How much plastic enters oceans annually?
What size are microplastics?
What prediction does Ocean Conservancy make about 2050?
options: Oceans will be free of pollution
More plastic than fish in the ocean

title: IELTS Listening: Job Interview Conversation
transcript: Interviewer: Thank you for coming in today. Can you tell me about your relevant experience? Applicant: I have worked for three years as a data analyst at a financial services company, where I developed dashboards for senior management and improved reporting efficiency by 40%. Interviewer: What is your greatest professional achievement? Applicant: Implementing an automated system that saved the company 200 hours per month.
translation: Wawancara kerja untuk posisi analis data. Pelamar memiliki pengalaman 3 tahun dan berhasil meningkatkan efisiensi pelaporan 40%.

questions.question: How many years of experience does the applicant have?
By how much did the applicant improve reporting efficiency?
What was the applicant greatest professional achievement?
options: Implementing a system saving 200 hours per month

title: IELTS Listening: University Seminar on Globalization
transcript: Today seminar examines the contested impacts of economic globalization. Proponents argue that free trade has lifted billions out of poverty and accelerated technological diffusion. Critics contend that it has increased wealth inequality between nations and within them, hollowed out manufacturing in developed economies, and undermined labor standards. The debate centers on whether the benefits can be redistributed more equitably.
translation: Seminar tentang dampak globalisasi ekonomi. Pendukung berargumen telah mengentaskan kemiskinan, sementara kritikus menyoroti meningkatnya kesenjangan kekayaan.

questions.question: What do proponents of globalization argue?
options: It has lifted billions out of poverty

questions.question: What concern do critics raise about globalization?
options: It increased wealth inequality and undermined labor standards

questions.question: What does the debate center on?
options: Whether to stop all free trade
Whether benefits can be redistributed more equitably
Whether to create a world government

title: IELTS Listening: Medical Consultation
transcript: Doctor: Based on your test results, your cholesterol levels are elevated. I recommend dietary changes, specifically reducing saturated fats and increasing fiber intake. You should also aim for 30 minutes of moderate exercise five days per week. Patient: Should I take medication? Doctor: Not yet. If your levels do not improve after three months of lifestyle changes, we will consider prescribing statins.
translation: Konsultasi medis tentang kolesterol tinggi. Dokter merekomendasikan perubahan diet dan olahraga sebelum mempertimbangkan pengobatan.

questions.question: What is the patient health issue?
How much exercise does the doctor recommend per day?
When will medication be considered?
options: After three months if levels do not improve

title: IELTS Listening: Technology Conference Talk
transcript: In this talk I explore how large language models are transforming natural language processing. These systems, trained on billions of text tokens, demonstrate emergent capabilities including reasoning, translation, and code generation. However, they exhibit significant limitations including hallucination, bias amplification, and opacity. Responsible AI development requires transparency mechanisms, robust evaluation frameworks, and ethical governance structures.
translation: Model bahasa besar mengubah pemrosesan bahasa alami tetapi memiliki keterbatasan termasuk halusinasi dan bias. Pengembangan AI bertanggung jawab memerlukan transparansi dan tata kelola etis.

questions.question: What are large language models trained on?
Which limitation of language models is mentioned?
What does responsible AI development require?
options: Transparency, evaluation frameworks, and ethical governance
